name: 地图基础
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 地理与空间 / Place & Geography / Place & Geography
curriculum_points: Students in Grade 3-4 will be able to create and interpret maps using conventional symbols, keys, and simple grid references to describe the location of places.
Students will demonstrate an understanding of scale and perspective by comparing different types of maps (e.g., political, physical, thematic) of the same region.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
